nodes.label: ADR 0004: Bangla-primary bilingual UI, not legacy's English-only chrome
nodes.rationale: Legacy Java Swing app has zero Bangla in its interface (verified against source). The rebuild deliberately deviates: UI ships bilingual with Bangla as default/primary and English as switchable secondary. Rejected staying English-only (cheapest, matches legacy) and English-primary-with-Bangla-secondary (common B2B default) because the product serves Bangladeshi school staff day-to-day, for whom Bangla is more natural. This is real added scope over legacy: full i18n infrastructure and translated copy across every screen.
